code:
import io
import string

fn get_line() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn get_byte(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

let line = get_line()
let n = string.len(line)
mut product = 1
mut i = 0
mut in_num = false
mut sign = 1
mut cur = 0

while i < n
  let b = get_byte(line, i)
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if in_num
      product = product * (sign * cur)
      in_num = false
      sign = 1
      cur = 0
    end
  else if b == 45
    sign = 0 - 1
    in_num = true
  else if b == 43
    in_num = true
  else
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    in_num = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  product = product * (sign * cur)
end

print("product=#{product}")
